name: mixed_latency
description: One long prefill class mixed with short interactive requests to test starvation and fairness.
shared_context: Short chat context: user asks a small local coding question.
Long agent context: full repo summary, previous tool traces, benchmark instructions, and serving roadmap.
Fairness target: short requests should continue to receive decode turns while long prefills progress in chunks.
user_templates: Request {request_id}: give the next action only.
Request {request_id}: produce a concise status update.
Request {request_id}: explain whether chunked prefill would help this case.
